user.title: Anycubic Kobra X LAN
user.description: Enter the IP address of your Anycubic Kobra X printer. The integration will test the connection before saving.

confirm.title: Confirm printer

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the printer. Check that the printer is turned on, LAN mode is enabled, and the IP address is correct.
error.auth_failed: Could not authenticate with the printer.

init.title: Anycubic Kobra X LAN options
init.description: Choose how often Home Assistant should ask the printer for updated data.
